Who I am

I build brands that
feel like movements.

Brand and experiential marketing professional with 4+ years of experience owning brand strategy, large-scale activations, GTM, and content engines across India and Europe.

I have built brands from zero, launched products, led Forbes India summits, and managed global content, always at the intersection of strategy and execution. I don't just think about brands. I build them, activate them, and make them felt.

02

eXtrefy

Invite-only social platform for founders

Case Study 02

eXtrefy

India's most ambitious founders had no real peer group. LinkedIn was too noisy, WhatsApp too casual. eXtrefy was built to change that, an invite-only platform where credibility is the entry ticket. I joined as a core founding team member and built it from zero.

My role

Brand identity, tone and visual language from scratch
UX copy, onboarding flows and feature input
Founder interviews to validate product decisions
Full GTM strategy and launch campaign
Experiential launch at DGEMS 2025 with 1,400+ founders in the room

The growth

The community kept growing offline.

Multi-city founder evenings across Mumbai, Delhi, and Bangalore turned digital connections into real relationships. The platform became a space founders actually returned to, built on trust, not noise.

300+Founders in first 60 days
60+Connections facilitated
3 citiesOffline meetup series

03

Sennheiser

Hannover, Germany · Brand and Strategy · 2023 to 2024

Previous Experience

Brand and Corporate Communications plus Strategy Development at Sennheiser's global HQ. Worked directly with executive leadership including both CEOs.

Go-to-Market Strategy

New Ingredient Brand GTM

Developed a 12-month GTM rollout for AMBEO, Sennheiser's spatial audio ingredient brand. Aligned positioning, multichannel campaigns, internal adoption strategy, and global partner enablement.

Internal Brand and Culture

Global Brand Transformation

Spearheaded a global internal brand overhaul, redesigning 5+ offices and digital employee platforms. Led high-profile brand activations attended by 50+ senior leaders including both CEOs Andreas and Daniel Sennheiser.

↑ 30% increase in employee engagement scores
Product and Market Strategy

Cross-functional Innovation

Led strategic product innovation workshops with 5+ global teams across Brand, Product, and Marketing, shaping long-term roadmaps positioning Sennheiser as a leader in immersive audio.

Shaped 3-year product roadmap
Analytics and Executive Advisory

Market Feasibility and Analysis

Delivered financial analysis, qualitative research, and feasibility studies informing executive go/no-go decisions. Built Power BI dashboards for board-level reporting and presented findings to C-suite.
